title: Red Aftertones
description: Changes parts of the main gui and hotbar to red aftertones
body:
Just changes some of the basic gui and hotbar to dark red and some light reds as I think it looks better that way. Will be adding more red textures later on and eventually all gui and hotbar options will be some form of red.

Patreon: https://www.patreon.com/Swaix

Ko-Fi: https://ko-fi.com/swaix

Support Server: https://discord.gg/FwC2c6u3Jt
